{{Infobox group
| name = Empire (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

''See also: [[Empire (The Elder Empire: Shadow) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Aurelian Empire]] is a vast civilization centered around its massive, bustling Capital. Founded approximately fifteen hundred years ago following the defeat of the [[Great Elders]], the Empire was established to bring stability and order to a world previously defined by chaos and the rule of ancient, terrifying entities. While [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] serves as the central symbol of human civilization and stability, his power is deeply intertwined with the [[Great Elders]]; he possesses a long [[life]] through their influence and utilizes a specialized throne called the [[Optasia]] to monitor and combat [[Elder]] activity globally. The structure of the Empire relies heavily on various [[Guilds]], which act as its primary pillars. These organizations, along with figures such as the [[Regents]] and certain founding members, work to maintain societal cohesion. However, the Empire faces significant internal and external threats. Internally, it struggles with corruption among its leadership and a weakening foundation that leaves it vulnerable to fragmentation. Externally, the [[Great Elders]]—described as unknowable and malevolent horrors—seek to destroy the Empire and reclaim their former dominion over the world. The survival of the Empire is a constant struggle against these entities, who influence the world through creatures known as [[Elderspawn]] and long-term strategic manipulations.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[The Empire]] is the governing body mentioned in the text.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[The Empire]] contains [[Readers]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[The Empire]] is an imperfect realm.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c9">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[The Empire]] is divided into regions under four [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Empire]] is a political entity that encompasses the town of [[Silverreach]] and operates under the influence of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]. Although it functions as an organization that the [[Consultants]] might potentially join, the Empire is currently weakening and has begun to collapse in on itself. This state of frailty has drawn the attention of the [[Great Elders]], who seek to destroy the organization entirely.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Emperor]] has an influence on the Empire.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Empire]] is a political entity containing the town of [[Silverreach]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Empire]] is described as weak and having collapsed in on itself.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Great Elders]] want to destroy the Empire.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Empire]] is weakening.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Empire]] is an organization that the [[Consultants]] might join.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Kelarac]] holds the reins of the Empire.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] has served the Empire.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Empire]] is a political entity described in the Introductory History of the Empire.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] is willing to go to prison to serve the Empire.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“We’re not a single Empire anymore, though,” Meia said. “We’ve already divided into regions, under the four Regents.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|“The Empire is weakening,” he said, walking the border between passion and insubordinate anger.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“Haven’t I served the Empire all this time?”<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“From the beginning, I was willing to go to prison to serve the Empire,” Lucan said.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
